query:
SELECT 'ratings' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM ratings WHERE establishmentId IN (7729, 2601, 4280, 7019, 1194, 1354, 6119, 7053)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'rating_items', COUNT(*) FROM rating_items WHERE ratingId IN (SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE establishmentId IN (7729, 2601, 4280, 7019, 1194, 1354, 6119, 7053))
UNION ALL
SELECT 'menu_items', COUNT(*) FROM menu_items WHERE establishmentId IN (7729, 2601, 4280, 7019, 1194, 1354, 6119, 7053)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'user_rankings', COUNT(*) FROM user_rankings WHERE establishmentId IN (7729, 2601, 4280, 7019, 1194, 1354, 6119, 7053);
